tasks.name: Recycling/Compost (Deliver)
tasks.description: Takes the compost bin (Green bin) out to the curb on Sunday Night. Takes recycling bins (Blue Bins) out to the curb on Monday Night.

tasks.name: Recycling/Compost (Return)
tasks.description: Takes compost bin (Green bin) from the curb back to rightside of the porch Monday morning. Takes recycling bins (Blue Bins) from the curb next to dumpster at back entrance Tuesday morning.

tasks.name: Kitchen Trash
tasks.description: Takes out Kitchen Trash whenever the trash bin is overflowing or close to being full, this person is responsible for replacing the trash bag for next use.
tasks.schedule: When Trash is Full or Overflowing

tasks.name: Dishes Rack
tasks.description: Takes out dry dishes from the rack and puts them back on the shelves with the corresponding spots for plates, utensils, cabinets.

tasks.name: Locked Doors & Compost
tasks.description: Make sure all doors are locked before going to bed and throws away 2 black compost bags from the backyard.
